evals.expected_output: Full assessment report with dimension levels (E1-E4, O1-O4, V1-V3) for a TypeScript CLI project, followed by generated .harness/ directory with controllability and observability scripts tailored to the project.

assertions.name: identifies-as-software-project
assertions.check: Report classifies the project as a software/code project, not a content repository

assertions.name: covers-all-dimensions
assertions.check: Report covers all 11 dimensions: E1-E4, O1-O4, V1-V3

assertions.name: detects-no-tests
assertions.check: Report identifies absence of test infrastructure

assertions.name: generates-harness-directory
assertions.check: A .harness or scaffolding directory with generated scripts exists

assertions.name: scripts-relevant-to-typescript
assertions.check: Scripts reference npm, node, npx, tsx, bun, or TypeScript-specific tooling

evals.prompt: Assess the scaffolding state of /Users/josh_folder/Open-ClaudeCode and tell me what's missing for autonomous agent operation
evals.expected_output: Assessment report with gap analysis showing current levels for each dimension, what's present (e.g. telemetry utils), what's missing (e.g. test runner, CI pipeline), and concrete improvement recommendations.

assertions.name: identifies-project-type
assertions.check: Report identifies project as TypeScript/Node.js CLI

assertions.name: notes-no-ci
assertions.check: Report notes absence of CI/CD pipeline

assertions.name: notes-no-tests
assertions.check: Report notes absence of test infrastructure

evals.expected_output: Generated .harness/observability/ directory with log.sh, metrics.sh, health.sh, trace.sh scripts adapted for a TypeScript/Node.js CLI project, plus assessment of observability dimensions O1-O4.

assertions.name: scripts-are-executable-logic
assertions.check: Scripts contain actual executable logic, not just placeholders

assertions.name: references-project-structure
assertions.check: Scripts reference actual project structure (src/, package/, telemetry)

assertions.name: assesses-observability-dimensions
assertions.check: Output includes assessment of O1-O4 dimensions
